# 0000 · Strengthening Lexicon — std-shaped tree

**Stamp:** `20260621.043012`
**Generated by:** `tools/enrich_strengthening_docs.rye`
**Chronicle floor:** [`9999_STRENGTHENING.md`](9999_STRENGTHENING.md)
**Flat index:** [`../work-in-progress/yonder/20260621-032327_strengthening-width-crosswalk.md`](../work-in-progress/yonder/20260621-032327_strengthening-width-crosswalk.md)

**Width audit:** 238/249 surfaces ✅ · 78/86 passes — ✅ requires Tiger/TAME `## usize explicit audit` all `done`, zero `fail`, live `pub fn`
*The ceiling of the strengthening-compiler folder. Number `0000` sorts first; `9999` sorts last. Together they bracket the countdown chronicle (`9913`–`9998`).*

---

## Two ways to navigate

| View | Role | Order |
|------|------|-------|
| **Lexicon** (this doc) | Find a strengthened surface by where it lives in `rye/lib/std` | std tree |
| **Chronicle** (`9913`–`9998`) | Read how Rye's `std` became ours, pass by pass | newest first |
| **Manifesto** (`9999`) | Method, four promises, versioning | floor |
| **Crosswalk** (`993`) | Machine index: pass → surface → width tier | pass number |

Each pass doc holds the full story — live strengthened implementation, **usize explicit audit** (Tiger/TAME policy via `tools/tame_usize_audit.rye`), audited surfaces, postconditions, witness. ✅ marks a surface with Tier C inherited `usize` documented, named `u32` bounds, seam casts checked — zero `fail` rows; `[ ]` marks gaps or missing live `pub fn`.

---
